query:
SELECT pl.liverId, l.name as liverName, bp.name as productName, bp.brandId, b.name as brandName, pl.specialPrice, pl.commissionRate
FROM product_livers pl
LEFT JOIN livers l ON l.id = pl.liverId
LEFT JOIN brand_products bp ON bp.id = pl.productId
LEFT JOIN brands b ON b.id = bp.brandId
ORDER BY pl.liverId
LIMIT 20;
